_preset: product-with-claims — a repo that makes competitive/novelty claims (a product, a launch, a 'first/only/fastest' pitch). Turns the CLAIM-* discipline ON: every claim needs a build-state, a blast-radius grade, and novelty claims need a dated prior-art pass with resolving citations.
_claims_file: the claims register. Scaffold from templates/CLAIMS.json. CLAIM-00..06 read it.
_prior_art_recheck_days: CLAIM-03: a novelty/competitive claim's prior-art pass goes stale after this many days and must be re-run.
